headline: Airbnb Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Shares Up
summary: ABNB shares gain after Q1 revenues beat estimates and bookings stayed strong despite higher cancelations tied to the Middle East conflict.

headline: Google, Broadcom Drive Delirious Demand. So Do 16 More Stocks.
summary: Fiery demand for AI stocks like Google, Broadcom, Micron, ASML and ever Caterpillar continues among the best mutual funds.
